bridge_strategy: start from verifiedswap22_bit33eq2, then combine the exact four frontier-over-repro absent gap rows from reprogap4 with the five quality-focused numeric anchors from verifiedmix while trimming the easiest five gravity and four unit stabilizers

selection_criteria.added_gap: Use the exact four proxy row ids where the tracked 131/200 frontier beats the clean 128/200 repro and which are absent from the bit33/numreal family.
selection_criteria.added_numeric: Reuse the five quality-focused numeric_2x2 anchors from the verifiedmix bridge, intentionally avoiding answer_only numeric rows.
selection_criteria.removed: Trim the easiest five Gravitational Constant and four Unit Conversion stabilizers still present in verifiedswap22_bit33eq2 by hard_score, prompt_len_chars, id.

notes: This is a queued hybrid between reprogap4 and verifiedmix, intended to test whether the narrow proxy reproducibility fix and the quality-focused numeric bridge stack constructively.
The resulting mix is Bit 34 / Text 18 / Gravity 10 / Unit 11 / Equation 7.
No answer_only numeric rows are used in this hybrid; reprogap5 remains the separate one-row answer_only hedge lane.
